hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美国银行首席执行官布赖恩·莫伊尼汉表示消费银行业务“健康”，高于预期；【FINANCE】尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张；【FINANCE】Bernstein 估计，到 2030 年，预测市场将增长至 1 万亿美元。

items.title: Bank of America tops estimates as CEO Brian Moynihan says consumer banking is 'healthy'
items.summary: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.
items.title_zh: 美国银行首席执行官布赖恩·莫伊尼汉表示消费银行业务“健康”，高于预期
items.summary_zh: 美国银行是美国资产第二大银行，其每股收益连续 23 个季度超出预期。

items.title: Chinese robotaxi companies forge ahead with UAE expansion despite Iran war
items.summary: Ride-hailing company Didi plans to begin its first overseas robotaxi test in the United Arab Emirates later this year.
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张
items.summary_zh: 网约车公司滴滴计划今年晚些时候在阿拉伯联合酋长国开始其首次海外机器人出租车测试。

items.title: Prediction markets will grow to $1 trillion by 2030, Bernstein estimates
items.summary: The investment bank said volumes will reach an estimated $240 billion in 2026 and grow at a 80% compound annual rate between 2025 and 2030.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 估计，到 2030 年，预测市场将增长至 1 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该投资银行表示，预计 2026 年交易量将达到 2400 亿美元，并在 2025 年至 2030 年间以 80% 的复合年增长率增长。

items.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
items.summary: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
items.title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
items.summary_zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

items.title: Allbirds abandons sneakers in pivot to AI computing, shares surge 400%
items.summary: The footwear brand plans reinvention as Newbird AI with a $50 million convertible in a sign of the broader market shift into GPU infrastructure.
items.title_zh: Allbirds 放弃运动鞋转向 AI 计算 股价飙升 400%
items.summary_zh: 该鞋类品牌计划重塑为 Newbird AI，推出价值 5000 万美元的敞篷车，这标志着更广泛的市场转向 GPU 基础设施。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran Threatens Retaliation Over U.S. Blockade
items.summary: Iran’s armed forces said they would attempt to expand their influence over sea lanes beyond the Strait of Hormuz if the U.S. military continued to block Iranian shipping.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：伊朗威胁对美国封锁进行报复
items.summary_zh: 伊朗武装部队表示，如果美军继续封锁伊朗航运，他们将试图扩大对霍尔木兹海峡以外海上航线的影响力。

items.title: Bitcoin developer Jameson Lopp says it's better to freeze 5.6 million BTC than let hackers have them
items.summary: Lopp says dormant coins could pose systemic risk if quantum computing gives attackers the ability to grab them, intensifying the growing “freeze or not freeze” debate.
items.title_zh: 比特币开发商 Jameson Lopp 表示，冻结 560 万比特币比让黑客拥有更好
items.summary_zh: 洛普表示，如果量子计算使攻击者能够抓住休眠代币，那么它们可能会带来系统性风险，从而加剧日益激烈的“冻结还是不冻结”争论。

items.title: Beyond ‘digital gold,’ Iran conflict forces a rethink of the nature of bitcoin
items.summary: Bitcoin's 12% gain since the Iran war began isn't a risk-on trade. It's the market repricing bitcoin's role as a neutral settlement layer, Bitwise's CIO argues.
items.title_zh: 除了“数字黄金”之外，伊朗冲突迫使人们重新思考比特币的本质
items.summary_zh: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，比特币上涨了 12%，这并不是一项冒险交易。 Bitwise 的首席信息官认为，市场正在重新定价比特币作为中立结算层的角色。

items.title: Bitdeer hits 70 EH/s in self-mining bitcoin operations, claims top spot by compute
items.summary: Bitdeer's total hashrate under management grew to 78.1 EH/s, including its massive self-mining fleet and hosted machines.
items.title_zh: Bitdeer 在自挖矿比特币操作中达到 70 EH/s，在计算方面排名第一
items.summary_zh: Bitdeer 管理的总算力增长至 78.1 EH/s，包括其庞大的自挖矿机群和托管机器。

items.title: Bitwise launches Avalanche ETF with plans to stake AVAX held
items.summary: "Avalanche is emerging as one of the leading platforms for businesses, governments, and real-world use cases," says Bitwise.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 推出 Avalanche ETF，计划持有 AVAX
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 表示：“Avalanche 正在成为企业、政府和现实世界用例的领先平台之一。”

items.title: Research with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to research with ChatGPT using search and deep research to find up-to-date information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行研究
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，使用搜索和深入研究来查找最新信息、分析来源并生成结构化见解。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Anthropic's Mythos reveals 'a lot more vulnerabilities' for cyberattacks
items.summary: The remarks show how a technology welcomed by corporations as a productivity boon can also pose serious threats, like uncovering new ways to hack into systems.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示，Anthropic 的神话揭示了网络攻击的“更多漏洞”
items.summary_zh: 这些言论表明，一项因提高生产力而受到企业欢迎的技术也可能带来严重威胁，例如发现侵入系统的新方法。

items.title: Citigroup beats estimates, boosted by gains in fixed income
items.summary: Citigroup reported its best quarterly revenue in a decade and a 56% year-over-year jump in earnings per share.
items.title_zh: 固定收益收益推动花旗集团业绩好于预期
items.summary_zh: 花旗集团公布了十年来最好的季度营收，每股收益同比增长 56%。

items.title: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Powell if he doesn't leave in May
items.summary: Donald Trump's threat marks the latest escalation in his ongoing spat with Jerome Powell.
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁美联储主席鲍威尔，如果他五月份不离开就解雇他
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普的威胁标志着他与杰罗姆·鲍威尔的持续争执的最新升级。

items.title: Israel and Hezbollah continue attacks after Israel-Lebanon talks in US
items.summary: Israel strikes hit southern Lebanon and Hezbollah fires rockets at Israel, a day after rare direct negotiations.
items.title_zh: 以色列-黎巴嫩在美国举行会谈后，以色列和真主党继续发动袭击
items.summary_zh: 在罕见的直接谈判一天后，以色列袭击了黎巴嫩南部，真主党向以色列发射火箭弹。

items.title: South Korea jails American YouTuber for public nuisance
items.summary: Johnny Somali sparked outrage after kissing a statue representing World War Two sex slaves.
items.title_zh: 韩国因公共滋扰罪入狱美国 YouTuber
items.summary_zh: 约翰尼·索马里在亲吻代表第二次世界大战性奴隶的雕像后引发了愤怒。

items.title: Claudia Sheinbaum’s War on Crime in Mexico Faces a Grim Reckoning: 133,000 Missing People
items.summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum of Mexico is under pressure to end one of her country’s most painful tragedies: the disappearance of more than 133,000 people.
items.title_zh: 克劳迪娅·谢因鲍姆 (Claudia Sheinbaum) 的墨西哥打击犯罪战争面临严峻清算：133,000 人失踪
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥总统克劳迪娅·辛鲍姆面临着结束该国最痛苦的悲剧之一的压力：超过 133,000 人失踪。

items.title: How Peter Magyar Defeated Viktor Orban, a Former Ally, In Hungary’s Election
items.summary: For years, Peter Magyar was a loyal ally of Viktor Orban, the far-right Hungarian leader. Then he changed sides — and defeated his former boss in a landslide victory on Sunday. Does he represent real change?
items.title_zh: 彼得·马扎尔 (Peter Magyar) 如何在匈牙利选举中击败前盟友欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orban)
items.summary_zh: 多年来，彼得·马扎尔 (Peter Magyar) 一直是匈牙利极右翼领导人欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orban) 的忠实盟友。然后他改变了立场，并在周日以压倒性胜利击败了他的前任老板。他代表了真正的改变吗？

items.title: Why Morgan Stanley's CFO sees tokenization as the next big step for its multi-trillion wealth business
items.summary: Morgan Stanley CFO Sharon Yeshaya says the bank is eyeing a "tokenized world" where blockchain technology allows client assets and liabilities to move more efficiently across its wealth management platform.
items.title_zh: 为什么摩根士丹利的首席财务官将代币化视为其数万亿财富业务的下一个重大步骤
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利首席财务官 Sharon Yeshaya 表示，该银行正在关注一个“代币化的世界”，其中区块链技术允许客户资产和负债在其财富管理平台上更有效地转移。

items.title: Pakistan lifts seven-year ban, allowing banks to service crypto providers
items.summary: Pakistan sent a letter to all banks and financial regulatory firms notifying them that they may provide crypto services,, but remain barred from trading or holding crypto assets.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦解除七年禁令，允许银行为加密货币提供商提供服务
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦致函所有银行和金融监管公司，通知他们可以提供加密服务，但仍被禁止交易或持有加密资产。

items.title: Justin Sun says Tron launching post-quantum upgrade plan
items.summary: Sun's comments follow recent debate over whether quantum computers could eventually break the cryptography that underpins cryptocurrencies.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·孙（Justin Sun）表示波场（Tron）推出后量子升级计划
items.summary_zh: 孙宇晨的评论是在最近关于量子计算机是否最终能够破解支撑加密货币的密码学的争论之后发表的。

items.title: Bitcoin researchers propose phased sunset of legacy signatures to address quantum risks
items.summary: A new Bitcoin proposal outlines a phased plan to restrict and eventually render quantum-vulnerable funds unspendable.
items.title_zh: 比特币研究人员建议分阶段取消遗留签名以解决量子风险
items.summary_zh: 一项新的比特币提案概述了一项分阶段计划，以限制并最终使量子脆弱的资金无法使用。

items.title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
items.summary: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.
items.title_zh: Agents SDK 的下一步发展
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过本机沙箱执行和模型本机工具更新了 Agents SDK，帮助开发人员跨文件和工具构建安全、长期运行的代理。

items.title: Using projects in ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use orojects in ChatGPT to organize chats, files, and instructions, manage ongoing work, and collaborate more effectively.
items.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中使用项目
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 中的项目来组织聊天、文件和说明、管理正在进行的工作以及更有效地协作。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE rises 4.3% as trades flat
items.summary: Aptos (APT), up 3.8% since Tuesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：AAVE 上涨 4.3%，交易持平
items.summary_zh: Aptos (APT) 自周二以来上涨 3.8%，与 Aave (AAVE) 一起成为表现最佳的股票。

items.title: Tether moves over $70 million in bitcoin to reserve wallet: Arkham
items.summary: The move is consistent with Tether's pattern of accumulating bitcoin and moving the asset to its reserve wallet periodically.
items.title_zh: Tether 转移超过 7000 万美元的比特币作为储备钱包：Arkham
items.summary_zh: 此举与 Tether 积累比特币并定期将资产转移到其储备钱包的模式一致。

items.title: Riot loses top data center exec as AI and hyperscale buildout ramps up; shares dip 6%
items.summary: To help fund its recent infrastructure investments, Riot Platforms has been selling off the bitcoin on its balance sheet.
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能和超大规模建设的增加，Riot 失去了数据中心的高级主管；股价下跌 6%
items.summary_zh: 为了为其最近的基础设施投资提供资金，Riot Platforms 一直在出售其资产负债表上的比特币。

items.title: Brix raises $5.5 million to tokenize emerging market assets, plans debut on MegaETH
items.summary: Brix plans to bring emerging market assets onchain, launching a Turkish lira-backed token as its first product on MegaETH.
items.title_zh: Brix 筹集 550 万美元用于新兴市场资产代币化，计划在 MegaETH 上首次亮相
items.summary_zh: Brix 计划将新兴市场资产引入链上，推出土耳其里拉支持的代币作为其在 MegaETH 上的第一个产品。

items.title: ChatGPT for research
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for research to gather sources, analyze information, and create structured, citation-backed insights.
items.title_zh: 用于研究的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，以收集资源、分析信息并创建结构化的、有引文支持的见解。

items.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title: Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165
items.title_zh: 训练 25 个物种的 mRNA 语言模型，仅需 165 美元

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: Morgan Stanley tops estimates as trading revenue exceeds expectations by nearly $1 billion
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's results in the quarter were powered by the firm's fixed income and equities trading operations, which produced about $8.5 billion in revenue.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利交易收入超预期近 10 亿美元，超出预期
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利本季度的业绩得益于该公司的固定收益和股票交易业务，产生了约 85 亿美元的收入。

items.title: David Einhorn signals caution as his hedge fund Greenlight prioritizes capital protection
items.summary: "It probably won't surprise anyone that we are again putting capital preservation at the top of our priorities," Einhorn said in his latest investor letter.
items.title_zh: 大卫·艾因霍恩 (David Einhorn) 表示谨慎，他的对冲基金 Greenlight 优先考虑资本保护
items.summary_zh: 艾因霍恩在最新的投资者信中表示：“我们再次将资本保值作为我们的首要任务，这可能不会令任何人感到惊讶。”

items.title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
items.summary: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
items.summary_zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

items.title: JPMorgan tops estimates on Wall Street results, Dimon flags 'increasingly complex' economic risks
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon called the economy resilient, but pointed to an "increasingly complex set of risks" across global markets.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通高于华尔街业绩预期，戴蒙表示经济风险“日益复杂”
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙称经济具有弹性，但指出全球市场“日益复杂的风险”。

items.title: Trump's rift with Pope is playing out in public - it's costing him valuable support
items.summary: Leading conservative Catholics tell the BBC why they back the American pontiff in his spat with Trump.
items.title_zh: 特朗普与教皇的不和正在公开化——这让他失去了宝贵的支持
items.summary_zh: 领先的保守派天主教徒告诉英国广播公司为什么他们支持美国教皇与特朗普的争执。

items.title: Nine killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
items.summary: Eight students and one teacher died in the attack, according to Interior Minister Mustafa Cifci.
items.title_zh: 土耳其两天内发生第二起校园枪击案，造成九人死亡
items.summary_zh: 内政部长穆斯塔法·西夫奇 (Mustafa Cifci) 表示，八名学生和一名教师在袭击中死亡。

items.title: Prominent Palestinian prisoner Marwan Barghouti assaulted three times in a month, family says
items.summary: The Israeli Prison Service says the allegation that Barghouti was subjected to physical violence by prison guards are "false and baseless".
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦著名囚犯马尔万·巴尔古提 (Marwan Barghouti) 一个月内遭到三次袭击，家人称
items.summary_zh: 以色列监狱管理局表示，有关巴尔古提遭受狱警身体暴力的指控是“错误且毫无根据的”。

items.title: Chinese national given one year in prison for smuggling ants out of Kenya
items.summary: Zhang Kequn was arrested in March while trying to travel to China with more than 2,000 live ants.
items.title_zh: 中国公民因从肯尼亚走私蚂蚁被判入狱一年
items.summary_zh: 张克群今年3月在试图携带2000多只活蚂蚁前往中国时被捕。

items.title: Sri Lanka repatriates 238 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack
items.summary: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those sent home.
items.title_zh: 斯里兰卡遣返238名因美国鱼雷袭击而滞留的伊朗水手
items.summary_zh: 美国袭击伊朗船只“Iris Dena”，导致 104 人丧生，幸存者也在被遣送回国的人员之中。

items.title: Magyar calls for fast handover of power in talks with Hungary's president
items.summary: Péter Magyar, the man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, wants the new parliament to convene in early May.
items.title_zh: 马扎尔在与匈牙利总统的会谈中呼吁迅速移交权力
items.summary_zh: 结束欧尔班维克托 16 年连续统治的彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 希望新议会于 5 月初召开。

items.title: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
items.summary: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.
items.title_zh: 南非任命种族隔离时代政治家为新驻美国大使
items.summary_zh: 罗尔夫·迈耶在结束南非白人少数统治的谈判中作为谈判代表发挥了关键作用。

items.title: Catholicism Thrives in Africa, but Pope’s Cameroon Visit Highlights a Divide
items.summary: Catholicism is growing fast on the continent, yet Africans play a comparatively small role in church leadership. Cameroon, where Leo XIV arrived on Wednesday, shows the disparity.
items.title_zh: 天主教在非洲蓬勃发展，但教宗喀麦隆之行凸显分歧
items.summary_zh: 天主教在非洲大陆迅速发展，但非洲人在教会领导中发挥的作用相对较小。利奥十四世周三抵达喀麦隆，就显示了这种差异。

items.title: How China’s Weapons Transfers to Iran Have Evolved Over Decades
items.summary: China has denied claims this month by U.S. intelligence that it might have shipped arms to Iran. In recent years, China has supported Iran with dual-use parts.
items.title_zh: 几十年来中国向伊朗的武器转让如何演变
items.summary_zh: 中国本月否认了美国情报部门有关其可能向伊朗运送武器的说法。近年来，中国向伊朗提供军民两用零部件支持。

items.title: Dodging Bombs and Drones, This Postman in Ukraine Still Delivers
items.summary: Oleksiy Klochkovsky has driven mail and parcels around the front line in Ukraine for four years. He keeps one ear tuned for danger from above.
items.title_zh: 躲避炸弹和无人机，乌克兰邮递员仍然送货
items.summary_zh: 四年来，奥莱克西·克洛奇科夫斯基 (Oleksiy Klochkovsky) 一直在乌克兰前线运送邮件和包裹。他用一只耳朵留意来自上方的危险。

items.title: When El Salvador’s Prisoners Are Set Free, She’s There To Pick Them Up
items.summary: Sugey Amaya’s brother was detained in El Salvador’s mass arrest campaign four years ago. She has devoted her life to helping prisoners like him.
items.title_zh: 当萨尔瓦多的囚犯获释时，她会去接他们
items.summary_zh: 苏吉·阿马亚的兄弟在四年前萨尔瓦多的大规模逮捕行动中被拘留。她一生致力于帮助像他这样的囚犯。

items.title: Trump Breaks With Meloni, Italy’s Leader, Amid Dispute Over Pope and Iran
items.summary: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni was once considered one of President Trump’s closest European allies. Their friendship now appears in danger.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在教皇和伊朗问题上与意大利领导人梅洛尼决裂
items.summary_zh: 总理乔治亚·梅洛尼曾被认为是特朗普总统最亲密的欧洲盟友之一。他们的友谊现在似乎处于危险之中。

items.title: American Streamer Johnny Somali Is Sentenced to Prison in South Korea
items.summary: Known for desecrating a monument to victims of sexual slavery, the former YouTuber was convicted on multiple charges and given a six-month sentence.
items.title_zh: 美国主播约翰尼·索马里在韩国被判入狱
items.summary_zh: 这位前 YouTuber 因亵渎性奴役受害者纪念碑而闻名，被判多项罪名成立，并被判处六个月徒刑。

items.title: At Least 4 Dead in Second School Shooting in Turkey in 2 Days
items.summary: An armed eighth grader opened fire in his middle school. At least one of those killed was a teacher.
items.title_zh: 土耳其两天内发生第二起校园枪击事件 至少4人死亡
items.summary_zh: 一名武装的八年级学生在他的中学开枪。遇难者中至少有一名是教师。

items.title: Wall Street won’t buy ‘trustless’ security promises
items.summary: Chen argues that crypto exchange security is still mostly theater, and that stricter enforcement is essential.
items.title_zh: 华尔街不会购买“无需信任”的安全承诺
items.summary_zh: 陈认为，加密货币交易安全仍然主要是戏剧性的，更严格的执法是必要的。

items.title: Crypto Long & Short: Fighting fraud in the digital age: why state-led identity is the future
items.summary: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Tricia Gallagher writes how the fix for broken digital identity systems will need to be state-led and user-controlled.
items.title_zh: 加密多空：打击数字时代的欺诈：为什么国家主导的身份是未来
items.summary_zh: 在本周的加密长短通讯中，特里西娅·加拉格尔 (Tricia Gallagher) 写道，如何修复损坏的数字身份系统需要由国家主导和用户控制。

items.title: TeraWulf stock declines on $900 million share sale to fund AI data center expansion
items.summary: The shares had been on a big run higher, rising more than 50% since late March.
items.title_zh: TeraWulf 股价因出售 9 亿美元股票以资助 AI 数据中心扩张而下跌
items.summary_zh: 该股自3月底以来大幅上涨，涨幅超过50%。

items.title: Prediction market volumes to hit $1 trillion by 2030 with Robinhood, Coinbase as key players, Bernstein says
items.summary: The broker said prediction markets are scaling into a trillion-dollar asset class, driven by regulatory clarity, crypto rails and distribution via major trading platforms.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 表示，预计到 2030 年，Robinhood、Coinbase 等市场规模将达到 1 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该经纪人表示，在监管明确性、加密货币轨道和主要交易平台分销的推动下，预测市场正在扩展到万亿美元的资产类别。

items.title: Trump-backed World Liberty proposes vesting overhaul for 62.3 billion tokens, would burn up to 10% of insider allocation
items.summary: WLFI proposes moving 62.3B locked tokens to fixed vesting schedules, requiring insiders to burn 10% of their allocation.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持的 World Liberty 提议对 623 亿枚代币进行归属改革，将燃烧高达 10% 的内部分配
items.summary_zh: WLFI 提议将 62.3B 锁定代币转移到固定的兑现时间表，要求内部人员销毁其分配的 10%。

items.title: OP Mainnet records ‘largest TVL event’ in its history as crypto card provider Etherfi goes live
items.summary: Crypto credit cards see roughly 100,000 average daily transactions, with Etherfi accounting for about a third of that volume.
items.title_zh: 随着加密卡提供商 Etherfi 上线，OP 主网记录了其历史上“最大的 TVL 事件”
items.summary_zh: 加密货币信用卡日均交易量约为 10 万笔，其中 Etherfi 约占该交易量的三分之一。

items.title: Bhutan moves 250 BTC as 2026 outflows top $240 million: Arkham data
items.summary: Bhutan moved 250 BTC on April 13, extending 2026 outflows to $240 million as holdings fell 73% from an October 2024 peak.
items.title_zh: Arkham 数据显示，2026 年资金外流将达到 2.4 亿美元，不丹转移了 250 个比特币
items.summary_zh: 不丹于 4 月 13 日转移了 250 个比特币，将 2026 年的流出量扩大至 2.4 亿美元，持有量较 2024 年 10 月的峰值下降了 73%。

items.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.summary: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.
items.title_zh: 下一个网络防御时代的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展了其可信网络访问计划，向经过审查的防御者引入 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​，并随着 AI 网络安全能力的进步而加强保障措施。

items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
items.title_zh: 企业通过 OpenAI 为 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 中的代理工作流程提供支持
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 将 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 引入 Agent Cloud，使企业能够快速、安全地构建、部署和扩展用于实际任务的 AI 代理。

items.title: Brainstorming with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas, organize thinking, and turn rough concepts into structured, actionable plans.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行头脑风暴
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 集思广益、组织思维，并将粗略的概念转化为结构化、可操作的计划。

items.title: Writing with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for writing to draft, revise, and refine content with clear structure, tone, and intent.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行写作
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行写作，以清晰的结构、语气和意图起草、修改和完善内容。

items.title: Responsible and safe use of AI
items.summary: Learn how to use AI responsibly with best practices for safety, accuracy, and transparency when using tools like ChatGPT.
items.title_zh: 负责任且安全地使用人工智能
items.summary_zh: 了解在使用 ChatGPT 等工具时如何负责任地使用人工智能以及实现安全性、准确性和透明度的最佳实践。

items.title: ChatGPT for customer success teams
items.summary: Learn how customer success teams use ChatGPT to manage accounts, improve communication, reduce churn, and drive adoption and renewals.
items.title_zh: 面向客户成功团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解客户成功团队如何使用 ChatGPT 来管理帐户、改善沟通、减少客户流失以及推动采用和续订。

items.title: Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents
items.title_zh: VAKRA 内部：代理的推理、工具使用和故障模式

items.title: Meet HoloTab by HCompany. Your AI browser companion.
items.title_zh: 了解 HCompany 的 HoloTab。您的人工智能浏览器伴侣。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 即将加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Any Custom Frontend with Gradio's Backend
items.title_zh: 任何带有 Gradio 后端的自定义前端

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS：下一代富有表现力的人工智能语音
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.summary: Skills in Chrome let you discover, save and remix AI workflows — and repeat them instantly.
items.title_zh: 将您最好的 AI 提示变成 Chrome 中的一键式工具
items.summary_zh: Chrome 中的技能可让您发现、保存和重新混合 AI 工作流程 - 并立即重复它们。

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.
items.title_zh: 人工智能经济论坛将人们聚集在一起
items.summary_zh: 谷歌将人们聚集在华盛顿特区，参加我们的人工智能经济论坛。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。
